runTitle: Vercel MCP QA - Frontend, AI Assistant, and Performance targeted validation
coveredSurfaces: / landing render with Chrome DevTools console/network/performance trace
/login OAuth/email/guest affordances and guest PIN modal via Playwright MCP
/dashboard guest-authenticated dashboard render with server status/resource cards
Dashboard AI sidebar open, AI engine Ready indicator, clarification flow, and explicit current-state response
Chrome DevTools Lighthouse desktop navigation: accessibility, best practices, SEO
Vercel usage check after production QA
skippedSurfaces: Reporter Agent and Analyst Agent advanced generation flows
Cloud Run admin /monitoring direct run.app endpoints
Authenticated OAuth provider completion beyond provider entry button visibility

aiLatencyObservations.source: AI assistant UI latency badge + resource timing

expertAssessments.rationale: Explicit current-state AI query matched dashboard counts and critical server, but the sidebar starter summary initially displayed an older/alternate warning-vs-critical summary before the explicit query corrected it.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add a targeted parity assertion for the AI sidebar starter summary against the current dashboard slot before treating starter summaries as release-gate evidence.

expertAssessments.rationale: Dashboard status, resource alert list, API health, AI health, monitoring report fetches, and version checks were visible and healthy on Vercel production.
Guest authentication was exercised through the real UI path, mutating auth bypass was not used, and the AI request completed through the production stream endpoint without console errors.
Vercel production usage remained billed at 0.0000 USD and health endpoints returned healthy/connected state.
Playwright MCP completed UI login, dashboard, AI sidebar, prompt, console, network, and screenshot capture without CLI fallback.
Dashboard and explicit AI answer aligned for the current query, but the starter summary mismatch indicates starter-response data-slot parity needs a deterministic regression check.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Track starter summary data-slot/source metadata and compare it with dashboard slot 96/143 in future QA.

usageChecks.summary: npm run check:usage:vercel passed after production MCP QA; effective usage 15.7310 USD, billed amount 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 14007.

artifacts.label: Playwright dashboard console after AI flow
Playwright dashboard network after AI flow

notes: Chrome DevTools Lighthouse desktop navigation on /: accessibility 100, best-practices 96, SEO 100; only failed audit was console error from known unauthenticated landing /api/system 401.
Chrome DevTools performance trace on /: LCP 995ms, TTFB 9ms, CLS 0.05, landing DOM 169 elements.
Playwright dashboard route after guest UI auth: DOMContentLoaded 549ms, load 606ms, FCP 448ms; dashboard + AI sidebar DOM 2289 elements.
Known nonblocking landing HEAD /api/system 401 remains visible in Chrome DevTools and is not treated as a new release blocker.
Playwright dashboard console after AI flow reported 0 errors and 0 warnings.
